rows.label: qev035603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Phew... It seems your attacks
broke the suit for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Honestly, that Earthling sold me
something completely outrageous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0003
rows.name:
This suit brings out an unbelievable
amount of power, but after wearing it
for a while, I lose control over my body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Rest easy. The voice I was
hearing from the suit has stopped.
I won't harm you anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_SEL0011
rows.name: Believe Slovity's words and lower your guard.

rows.label: qev035603_SEL0021
rows.name: Don't believe Slovity's words and remain on guard.

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're a soft-hearted one! What were
you going to do if this was a lie?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hehe... But because you're that kind
of person, we were able to follow
your words and surrender to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0007
rows.name:
You're a good warrior. You don't let
your guard down that easily, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0008
rows.name:
But it's okay now! If I do something weird,
you can kill me without hesitation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0009
rows.name:
...For now, I have to take this Bias
to NLA and treat his injuries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, normally I wouldn't even want to
touch someone from the Tree Clan, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0011
rows.name:
This time, it's my fault.
I'll carry him there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035603_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll give you my thanks once we
return. See you over there, then![ST:wait ]
